title: iltisiella humilis
intro: Iltisiella humilis, also known as the "low-growing Iltisiella," is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iltisiella humilis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially aiding in the treatment of various diseases. Iltisiella humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
